seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Te Kowai and Teebar. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Te Kowai vs Teebar: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Te Kowai and Teebar.
heading: Te Kowai vs Teebar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Te Kowai, Queensland and Teebar, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Teebar has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Te Kowai (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Te Kowai or Teebar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Te Kowai has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Teebar scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Te Kowai scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Teebar scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Te Kowai or Teebar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Teebar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
